pages.title: Slay PDF - Free Local PDF Editor & Adobe Acrobat Alternative
pages.description: Slay PDF is a free local PDF editor and Adobe Acrobat alternative for splitting, merging, signing, posterising, resizing and editing PDFs entirely in your browser.
pages.h1: Slay PDF

pages.title: PDF Tools - Slay PDF
pages.description: Browse Slay PDF tools: merge, split, sign, rotate, crop, resize, redact, compress, OCR, extract text, export images, fill forms and password protect PDFs locally.
pages.h1: Pick a job. Keep the document.

pages.title: PDF Tool Search - Slay PDF
pages.description: Search Slay PDF tools and guides for local PDF editing, Adobe Acrobat alternatives, merge, split, sign, OCR, crop, redact and browser PDF workflows.
pages.h1: Search Slay PDF tools and guides.

pages.title: Free Local PDF Editor - Slay PDF
pages.description: Use Slay PDF as a free local PDF editor for merging, splitting, signing, resizing, posterising and editing PDFs without uploading documents.
pages.h1: Edit PDFs locally in your browser.

pages.title: Adobe Acrobat Alternative - Slay PDF
pages.description: Slay PDF is a free Adobe Acrobat alternative for local PDF edits: merge, split, sign, resize, posterise, annotate and export PDFs in the browser.
pages.h1: A local PDF editor for jobs that should not need Acrobat.

pages.title: Privacy - Slay PDF
pages.description: Slay PDF privacy details: PDFs and edits stay in the browser, active workspaces use local browser storage, and export passwords are never saved.
pages.h1: Your PDFs stay in this browser.

pages.title: PDF Privacy & Security Model - Slay PDF
pages.description: Slay PDF security model for local PDF editing: browser-only processing, local workspace storage, password handling, WebAssembly engines and practical privacy limits.
pages.h1: What local PDF editing actually protects.

pages.title: HTML Sitemap - Slay PDF
pages.description: Browse every canonical Slay PDF page for local PDF editing, PDF tools, private browser workflows and Adobe Acrobat alternative guides.
pages.h1: Slay PDF sitemap

pages.title: Merge PDF Files Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Merge PDF files locally with Slay PDF. Combine pages, reorder documents, rotate pages and export one PDF from your browser.
pages.h1: Merge PDFs without uploading them.

pages.title: Split PDF Files Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Split PDF files locally with Slay PDF. Delete pages, export selected pages or add split markers to create separate PDFs from one document.
pages.h1: Split a PDF into exactly the pages you need.

pages.title: Delete PDF Pages Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Delete PDF pages locally with Slay PDF. Remove blank, duplicate or unwanted pages and export a clean PDF without uploading files.
pages.h1: Remove pages from a PDF without uploading it.

pages.title: Organize PDF Pages - Slay PDF
pages.description: Organize PDF pages locally with Slay PDF. Reorder, delete, rotate, merge, split and export selected PDF pages from your browser.
pages.h1: Reorder, delete, rotate, merge and split PDF pages.

pages.title: Crop PDF Pages Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Crop PDF pages locally with Slay PDF. Trim margins, clean scans and export cropped PDFs without uploading documents.
pages.h1: Crop PDF pages and trim margins locally.

pages.title: Resize PDF Pages Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Resize PDF pages locally with Slay PDF. Change paper size, switch orientation and preserve aspect ratio with white letterboxing.
pages.h1: Change PDF page size without stretching the page.

pages.title: Rotate PDF Pages Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Rotate PDF pages locally with Slay PDF. Turn selected pages left or right and export the corrected PDF from your browser.
pages.h1: Rotate sideways PDF pages locally.

pages.title: Posterise PDF Pages - Slay PDF
pages.description: Posterise PDF pages locally with Slay PDF. Split one page across multiple printable pages and resize PDFs without stretching content.
pages.h1: Turn a PDF page into printable poster tiles.

pages.title: Sign PDF Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Sign PDFs locally with Slay PDF. Add a visual signature, text, highlights and page edits without uploading the document.
pages.h1: Add a signature to a PDF without sending it away.

pages.title: Annotate PDF Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Annotate PDFs locally with Slay PDF. Add text, highlights, rectangles, ink drawings, signatures and redactions in your browser.
pages.h1: Add PDF annotations in your browser.

pages.title: Redact PDF Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Redact PDFs locally with Slay PDF. Place secure redaction blocks and rasterize redacted pages before export.
pages.h1: Cover sensitive PDF content locally.

pages.title: Watermark PDF Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Add a watermark to PDFs locally with Slay PDF. Apply draft, confidential or review watermarks before exporting.
pages.h1: Add a watermark before exporting your PDF.

pages.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF - Slay PDF
pages.description: Add page numbers to PDFs locally with Slay PDF. Number exported pages after merging, splitting or reordering.
pages.h1: Add page numbers after organizing a PDF.

pages.title: Fill PDF Forms Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Fill PDF forms locally with Slay PDF. Edit supported AcroForm text, checkbox, dropdown and radio fields in your browser.
pages.h1: Fill supported PDF form fields locally.

pages.title: Compress PDF Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Compress PDFs locally with Slay PDF. Choose compression presets and export smaller PDFs from your browser.
pages.h1: Compress PDF exports from your browser.

pages.title: OCR PDF Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Run English OCR on PDFs locally with Slay PDF and export searchable PDFs from your browser.
pages.h1: Create searchable OCR PDFs in the browser.

pages.title: PDF to Images Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Convert PDF pages to images locally with Slay PDF. Export selected pages as page images from your browser.
pages.h1: Export PDF pages as images locally.

pages.title: Images to PDF - Slay PDF
pages.description: Convert images to PDF locally with Slay PDF. Import PNG, JPEG or WebP images, reorder pages and export one PDF from your browser.
pages.h1: Convert images into a local PDF.

pages.title: Extract PDF Text Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Extract text from PDFs locally with Slay PDF. Export plain text from selected PDF pages in your browser.
pages.h1: Export text from PDF pages in your browser.

pages.title: Edit Scanned PDF - Slay PDF
pages.description: Edit scanned PDFs locally with Slay PDF. Rotate scans, crop margins, remove blank pages, run OCR and export clean PDFs from your browser.
pages.h1: Clean up scanned PDFs locally.

pages.title: Flatten PDF - Slay PDF
pages.description: Flatten PDF form fields locally with Slay PDF. Fill supported forms, optionally flatten fields and export a clean PDF from your browser.
pages.h1: Fill and flatten supported PDF forms.

pages.title: Password Protect PDF Locally - Slay PDF
pages.description: Password protect PDF exports locally with Slay PDF. Encrypt exported PDFs with AES-256 from your browser.
pages.h1: Encrypt PDF exports with a password.
